data.content: Implementation complete on codex/3d0f-stale-grooming at 8091ba70446659f0bac74018d988f5204bc684db. Added stale-beat grooming rail on the overview screen, explicit agent/model selection, stale review API/queue/worker/store, prompt parsing, and hermetic tests. Validation: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; Playwright smoke on /beats?view=overview confirmed the stale rail and review controls render.
